What We Do

Our Services

Professional roofing contractor solutions tailored to your needs.

Roof Repair

Fast, reliable roof repair services to protect your Fort Worth home from the elements.

Learn More →

Roof Replacement

Upgrade your Fort Worth home with a durable, beautiful new roof from Rivera Brothers.

Learn More →

Roof Inspections

Comprehensive roof inspections to identify potential problems before they become major issues.

Learn More →

Gutter Services

Protect your home's foundation with professional gutter installation, repair, and cleaning.

Learn More →

Siding Installation

Boost curb appeal and protect your home with durable siding installation services.

Learn More →

Storm Damage Repair

Reliable storm damage repair services to restore your home after severe weather events.

Learn More →
Flexible Options

Financing That Works With Your Goals

We believe every customer deserves access to top-quality roofing contractor services. That's why we offer flexible options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path forward.

  • Low monthly payments
  • Quick approval process
  • No hidden fees

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

Rivera Brothers came out quickly after that crazy hail storm we had in Arlington Heights. They fixed the damaged shingles and even checked for other potential problems. Honest and reliable service!

Maria S.
★★★★★

Needed my gutters cleaned before the spring rains hit Dallas. Rivera Brothers did a great job, cleaned up everything, and the price was fair. Will definitely use them again.

Robert B.
★★★★

We had Rivera Brothers replace our old roof in Plano. The whole process was smooth from start to finish. They were professional, communicative, and the new roof looks fantastic! Great job!

Jessica K.
★★★★★

As a first-time home buyer in McKinney, I wanted to get a roof inspection before closing. Rivera Brothers was thorough and explained everything clearly. Helped me feel confident in my purchase.

David L.
★★★★★

Rivera Brothers installed new siding on our house in Frisco, and it looks amazing! The crew was efficient and professional, and the price was very competitive. Highly recommend!

Sarah M.
★★★★★

After a bad storm, Rivera Brothers helped me repair my fence and some roof damage. They worked quickly and efficiently, and were great to work with. They even handled most of the work with my insurance company, which was a huge help!

Michael A.
★★★★
Read All Reviews →
How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Inspection

Our certified team will thoroughly evaluate your needs and provide a detailed, transparent estimate.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced team handles everything — from start to finish — with precision and care.

04

Final Walkthrough

We walk through the completed work with you to ensure every detail meets our high standards.

Our Promise

Why Choose Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards on every single job — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every job we complete strengthens the community we call home.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing what we say we'll do — every single time.

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

How quickly can you respond to a roof repair emergency?
We prioritize emergency roof repairs and strive to respond as quickly as possible, often within hours. Call us immediately, and we'll dispatch a team to assess the damage and provide temporary protection if needed.
What types of roof repairs do you handle?
We handle all types of roof repairs, including shingle replacement, leak detection and repair, flashing repair, chimney repair, and storm damage repair. No job is too big or too small.
Do you offer a warranty on your roof repair services?
Yes, we offer a warranty on all our roof repair services. The specific warranty details will vary depending on the type of repair and materials used. We'll provide you with complete warranty information before starting any work.

Excellence. Community. Integrity.
That's Rivera Brothers Roofing & Construction.

Ready to get started? Fill out the form and our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
